nodes.context: Organized crime syndicate in the Philippines, originally an anti-communist vigilante group involved in drug trafficking, kidnapping, murder, extortion, and illegal gambling.
Youth club that originally established Kuratong Baleleng in 1986 to prevent the spread of Communist guerrillas.
Muslim guerrilla group in Mindanao; ties to Kuratong Baleleng led Maguindanaon clans to join the syndicate.
Criminal clan that led Kuratong Baleleng; most members were killed or captured during the Philippine drug war.

edges.context: Kuratong Baleleng was originally established by the Botanical Youth Club in 1986.
Ties to Maguindanao guerrillas led Muslim Maguindanaon clans to join Kuratong Baleleng.
The Parojinog clan, led by Octavio Parojinog, led Kuratong Baleleng.
